ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "T_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded on the date */,
  "T_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded on the date */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount on the date */,
  "streamflow" REAL /* Streamflow measurement on the date */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year for the measurement */,
  "T_max_lag1" REAL /* Maximum temperature from the previous day */,
  "T_max_lag2" REAL /* Maximum temperature from two days prior */,
  "T_min_lag1" REAL /* Minimum temperature from the previous day */,
  "T_min_lag2" REAL /* Minimum temperature from two days prior */,
  "P_lag1" REAL /* Precipitation from the previous day */,
  "P_lag2" REAL /* Precipitation from two days prior */,
  "SF_lag1" REAL /* Streamflow from the previous day */,
  "SF_lag2" REAL /* Streamflow from two days prior */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to weather type */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to weather station */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level on the date */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed on the date */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction on the date */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type (e.g., Rain, Snow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the weather type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report generated */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data used in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed, custom) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
